creator: joe@thrallingpenguin.com
text:
Vagrant for FreeBSD. It has been tested with emulators/virtualbox-ose.

Please note that this port requires the following PR's before it will work:

devel/rubygem-bundler (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187585)
devel/rubygem-erubis (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187586)
devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187587)
devel/rubygem-log4r (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187589)
net/rubygem-net-ssh (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187588)
net/rubygem-net-scp (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187590)
devel/rubygem-wdm (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187591)
devel/rubygem-childprocess (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187592)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
